highlights.text: Hanoi (2N) → Halong Bay (2N) → Hoi An (1N) romantic sanctuary
Intimate Hanoi welcome dinner & slow-paced cultural harmony
Ultra-luxury private Halong Bay cruise with candlelit dinners
Hoi An lantern-lit Ancient Town magic at night

itinerary.title: Romantic Vietnam Couple Tour
itinerary.tagline: Hanoi Charm • Halong Bay Private Cruise • Hoi An Romantic Streets
itinerary.overview: Begin your romantic journey together in the enchanting landscapes of Vietnam. This TRAGUIN curated couple's sanctuary blends the colonial charm of Hanoi, the serene luxury of a private cruise in Halong Bay, and the intimate streets of Hoi An — ensuring unforgettable memories in a truly romantic setting.
itinerary.seo_title: VN-003 | Romantic Vietnam Couple Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Vietnam honeymoon package (VN-003): Hanoi, private Halong Bay cruise, and Hoi An lantern magic.

days.title: Arrival in Hanoi & Intimate Welcome
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your intimate boutique hotel. Savor a quiet, romantic welcome dinner in the heart of the city.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private transfer, romantic welcome dinner

days.title: Hanoi Cultural Harmony
days.description: A slow-paced, romantic exploration of Hanoi's hidden streets, museums, and local charms, perfect for couples wanting to discover cultural richness.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Slow-paced Hanoi cultural exploration

days.title: Halong Bay Private Cruise
days.description: Transfer to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury private cruise vessel for an intimate getaway on the emerald waters.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Transfer to Halong Bay, private cruise boarding
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Ultra-Luxury Private Cruise)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Gourmet Cruise Dinner

days.title: Halong Bay Serenity
days.description: A day of private exploration, featuring sunset deck relaxation, cave visits, and candlelit dinners under the stars — unforgettable memories.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Cave visits, sunset deck relaxation, candlelit dinner
Overnight Stay: Halong Bay (Ultra-Luxury Private Cruise)
Meals Included: Premium Breakfast & Candlelit Dinner

days.title: Hoi An Lantern Magic
days.description: Flight to Da Nang, followed by a romantic transfer to Hoi An. Experience the magic of the lantern-lit Ancient Town at night.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Domestic flight to Da Nang, Hoi An Ancient Town evening visit
Overnight Stay: Hoi An (Romantic Resort Retreat)

days.title: Departure
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer, completing your premium romantic Vietnam sojourn.

inclusions.text: 05 Nights in handpicked romantic hotels and private cruise across Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Hoi An
Ultra-luxury private Halong Bay cruise with candlelit dining
Domestic flight to Da Nang and Hoi An Ancient Town evening experience
International airfare and Vietnam entry visa processing fees
Personal expenses, laundry, room service, and mini-bar charges
Optional sightseeing excursions not specified in the itinerary
Tipping, porterage fees, and travel insurance
